pr.title: Order-13 N-gram Oracle + Score-First TTT (0.0308 BPB)

output.summary: Pre-fill order-13 n-gram oracle tables and blend them with neural logits, then run score-first test-time training during validation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first test-time training adapts weights on validation chunks before reporting metrics.
techniques: Order-13 n-gram oracle pre-filled from training data
BackoffNgramMixer combines neural and n-gram experts
Score-first test-time training on validation chunks
